scripts.start: concurrently -n PORTAL,VUE,REACT,ANGULAR -c auto "pnpm run portal" "pnpm --dir 1verificador-vue run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "pnpm --dir 2postulacion-react run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5174" "pnpm --dir 3seguimiento-angular run start -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4200"
scripts.build: vite build && pnpm --dir 1verificador-vue run build && pnpm --dir 2postulacion-react run build && pnpm --dir 3seguimiento-angular run build -- --base-href /angular/ && node scripts/build-integrado.mjs
